name: Independence Day Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: Ready-to-spread creamy vanilla frosting or 2 cans (16 oz)
2 cups fresh strawberries, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 15x10-1/2 inch jelly roll pan.
3. In a small bowl, stir together cocoa and boiling water until smooth.
4. In a large bowl, beat shortening, sugar, and vanilla extract.
5. Add eggs to the mixture and beat well.
6. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add alternately with buttermilk to the shortening mixture.
7. Stir in the cocoa mixture.
8. Spread batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 28-30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Remove about 3/4 cup frosting; add food coloring to 1/2 cup frosting to achieve desired shade of blue. Set aside.
12. Spread remaining vanilla frosting over the top of the cake.
13. Spread blue frosting in the upper left corner and pipe stars in the blue field with the reserved vanilla frosting.
14. Shortly before serving, place strawberries in seven rows on top of the cake to represent the red stripes of the flag.
15. Serve and enjoy!
